calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-19-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2017 Continued To Feb-05-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Hearing And Notice Of Motion To Compel Furhter Responses, Et Al.
Off Calendar Aug-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Terence Kilpatrick, Esq. of Kilpatrick Law Offices, Tel. 916.979.7025, appearing for plaintiff and moving party via Court Call;
Joseph A. Roman, Esq. of the Law Office of Joseph A. Roman, Tel. 760.323.2090, appearing for defendant and opposing party via Court Call.

RULING: Both parties stipulated for the motion to be heard by a judge pro tem. The matter was argued. After arugments, PLAINTIFF WILLIAM SHINE's Motion To Compel Further Responses, etc. is granted. Sanctions in the amount of $750 is granted. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2017 Set For Trial On Nov-13-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Continued To May-17-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
